projectDescription: A declarative domain modeling language with a reference runtime that lets developers define entities, commands, guards, policies, and events that compile to an executable Intermediate Representation.
keyFeatures: Declarative entity and command definitions with typed properties
Guard-based authorization with strict ordered evaluation
Policy system scoped to read, write, execute, and all operations
Event emission with outbox pattern support
Compiles to portable Intermediate Representation (IR) JSON
Next.js projection for auto-generated API routes
Pluggable store adapters: memory, PostgreSQL, Supabase, custom
Audit sink for durable command execution records
CLI for compile, generate, build, and validate workflows
Deterministic execution mode for testing and reproducibility
vNext: constraint severity, overrides, concurrency controls, idempotency
publicApiSurface: Next.js projection: nextjs.route, nextjs.command, ts.types, ts.client — @angriff36/manifest/projections/nextjs
CLI: manifest init, manifest compile, manifest generate, manifest build, manifest validate
